workflows.title: Literature Review Assistant
workflows.summary: Move from reading list to source matrix with checks built in.
workflows.description: A repeatable workflow for summarising papers, checking claims and building a comparison matrix before writing.
workflows.author: Workflow by James L.

workflowSteps.label: Input sources
workflowSteps.description: Collect bibliographic details, PDFs and your own skim notes before using AI.

workflowSteps.label: Extract claims
workflowSteps.description: Ask for claims, methods, limitations and key terms for one source at a time.

workflowSteps.label: Human check
workflowSteps.description: Check every generated point against the original source and mark anything uncertain.

workflowSteps.label: Compare
workflowSteps.description: Move verified points into a matrix so similarities, differences and gaps are visible.

workflows.checkingAdvice: Do not cite AI summaries. Cite the original sources after checking the generated notes yourself.

workflows.title: Group Project Brief Builder
workflows.summary: Turn a shared project aim into roles, risks and first actions.
workflows.description: A structured workflow for using AI during early group planning while keeping decisions with the team.
workflows.author: Workflow by Mina K.

workflowSteps.label: Define aim
workflowSteps.description: Write the project aim, constraints and deadline in the team's own words.

workflowSteps.label: Generate questions
workflowSteps.description: Ask AI for questions the team should answer before choosing a direction.

workflowSteps.label: Assign roles
workflowSteps.description: Convert agreed tasks into named owners, dates and dependencies.

workflowSteps.label: Review risks
workflowSteps.description: Discuss risks as a group before the plan is final.

workflows.checkingAdvice: Use AI to expose options, not to decide roles or allocate responsibility.
